records.name: Adamantine Mask
records.review: 1.0-era Dark Lord (Adamantine) piece backported from the S6 dataset for the agnis/broy ancient sets; other DL gear is not backported this wave

records.name: Red Wing Helm
records.review: Red Wing is Summoner (post-pre-S3 class) gear, not 1.0-era; backported only as a piece of the approved chrono/semeden ancient-set backports; classes empty -> unequippable in baseline

records.name: Wings of Spirits
records.review: 1.0-era 2nd wing backported from S6 dataset; muse_elf only (source class value 2); max_item_level clamped 15->11; dmg +32%/abs 25%, +1%/level (wing_damage_second)

records.name: Wings of Soul
records.review: 1.0-era 2nd wing backported from S6 dataset; soul_master only (source class value 2); max_item_level clamped 15->11; dmg +32%/abs 25%, +1%/level (wing_damage_second)

records.name: Wings of Dragon
records.review: 1.0-era 2nd wing backported from S6 dataset; blade_knight only (source class value 2); fast wing speed 16; max_item_level clamped 15->11; dmg +32%/abs 25%, +1%/level (wing_damage_second)

records.name: Wings of Darkness
records.review: 1.0-era 2nd wing backported from S6 dataset; magic_gladiator (source class value 1); max_item_level clamped 15->11; dmg +32%/abs 25%, +1%/level (wing_damage_second)

records.name: Loch's Feather
records.review: 1.0-era 2nd-wings mix ingredient from S6 Wings.cs; source sets drops_from_monsters=false and max_item_level=1

records.name: Fruits
records.review: 1.0-era stat fruit backported from S6 dataset (fruits chaos-mix result); item level 0-4 encodes the fruit's stat kind; consume behavior (stat point add/remove) is a rule, not data

records.name: Scroll of Archangel
records.review: Blood Castle ticket item, approved 1.0-era backport from S6 dataset; gates 7/8 of max_item_level are arguably later-era (7: S1+, 8: S3)

records.name: Blood Bone
records.review: Blood Castle ticket item, approved 1.0-era backport from S6 dataset; gates 7/8 of max_item_level are arguably later-era (7: S1+, 8: S3)

records.name: Invisibility Cloak
records.review: Blood Castle entry ticket (blood_castle_ticket mix result), approved 1.0-era backport from S6 dataset; level gates 7/8 as above

records.name: Cape of Lord
records.review: 1.0-era Dark Lord wing backported from S6 Wings.cs (cape_of_lord chaos-mix result); max_item_level clamped 15->11; dmg +20%/abs 10%, +2%/level (wing_damage_first); its S6 option definitions (Cape of Lord Options = 2nd-wing options + Command wing option, per-item random phys dmg) are S6-only option data and NOT backported -- only luck referenced, matching the 2nd-wing option gap in options_sets

records.name: Jewel of Creation
records.review: 0.97d-era jewel (Version097d dataset is the oldest pre-S3 source; tagged s6 because source_version has no 097d value); backported as the fruits chaos-mix ingredient
